name: Bloom Siege
description: The Bloom has become aggressive, actively sieging settlements and blocking major routes. Towns are fortified, but supplies are running low.

events.name: Siege Begins
events.description: Bloom creatures have surrounded the outer settlements.

events.name: Supply Crisis
events.description: Trade routes are cut. Prices have skyrocketed.

events.name: Breakout Attempt
events.description: The Bureau leads a breakout attempt. Volunteers needed.
